Appearances:
Plaintiff Citibank NA, is present.
Attorney, Randall Naiman, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Victor Kubara and Jesus Espinoza , are present.
Attorney, Melvin Bell, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Mary McLain, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
